name: Speedy Cash
description_short: Speedy Cash offers payday loans up to $425, lines of credit up to $4,000, and title loans up to $4,000 with same-day in-store service at Memphis locations.
description_long:
Speedy Cash is a short-term lending storefront operator with multiple locations across Memphis, Tennessee, including the Summer Avenue branch at 5126 Summer Ave. The company has positioned itself as a neighborhood alternative to traditional banking for customers needing rapid access to emergency funds. Founded on the "Tomorrow can be payday®" brand promise, they operate extended retail hours (9am-7pm most weekdays) to accommodate working customers.

The company offers three primary loan products: Payday Loans up to $425 with repayment due on the next paycheck, Lines of Credit up to $4,000 with flexible draw options and extended repayment terms, and Title Loans up to $4,000 secured by vehicle collateral. All products can be initiated online or completed in-store with immediate funding for qualified applicants. Beyond lending, Speedy Cash provides ancillary money services including check cashing, money orders, wire transfers, and Green Dot Visa debit card services.

Speedy Cash distinguishes itself through rapid approval and funding timelines, in-store assistance throughout the application process, transparent fee disclosure before signing, and vehicle appraisal services for title loans conducted on-site. The company maintains a dedicated customer service line (1-888-333-1360) and operates Spanish-language support (1-855-734-0111). Their application requirements are straightforward, requiring only valid ID, proof of income, contact information, and proof of address for most products.

However, customers should recognize this is a high-cost lending option designed for short-term emergencies. The company does not disclose APR or fee structures on their website, which is typical for payday lenders but means actual borrowing costs are not transparent before in-store consultation. Title loans require clear title in certain states and vehicle insurance. This product category exists outside traditional credit systems and should be approached as a last-resort emergency option, not a primary financial tool.
pros: Extended weekday hours (up to 7pm Monday and Friday) accommodate working customers unable to visit during standard business hours
Same-day or next-day funding available for approved in-store applications, providing genuine emergency access to cash
Transparent pricing disclosed before signing—borrowers know exact costs prior to loan agreement
Flexible Line of Credit product (up to $4,000) with renewable credit availability as principal is repaid
In-store team assistance throughout application and document signing process reduces confusion
Multiple nearby Memphis locations (9 listed stores) provide convenient neighborhood access
Additional money services (check cashing, wire transfers, money orders) available at same locations
cons: APR and complete fee structures not disclosed on website; actual borrowing costs only revealed during in-store consultation
Payday loans capped at $425—insufficient for most true emergencies; higher-need customers pushed to title loans requiring vehicle collateral
Title loans require clear title in multiple states (MS, NV, TX) and proof of vehicle insurance, excluding many potential borrowers
High-cost lending model typical of payday industry; designed as short-term emergency product, not sustainable financing
No online loan status tracking or digital document access mentioned; customers appear required to visit in-store
best_for: Customers needing $400-$425 for immediate expenses before next paycheck with stable employment
Vehicle owners with urgent $1,000-$4,000 cash needs who can provide clear title and insurance proof
Workers with irregular schedules who need evening/weekend lending access and in-person guidance through application
diagnosis: Speedy Cash is best for employed individuals with immediate cash needs under $425 or vehicle owners needing $1,000-$4,000 who can visit a store and complete same-day underwriting. The critical caveat is that this is high-cost emergency lending; APR structures are not disclosed online, and the product is designed for short-term use, not sustained borrowing. Customers should exhaust lower-cost alternatives (employer advances, credit union PALs, family loans) before using this service.
services: Green Dot Visa Debit Card services
In-store loan application and document signing
In-store financial consultation and loan option review
